title: cyrtomium haitiense
intro: Cyrtomium haitiense, also known as Haitian fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the island of Haiti in the Caribbean. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyrtomium haitiense include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
